form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 4 length fourth (19.45) over 350m at this track. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 350m (18.79) beating Tuckeroo Road in Grade 5 on April 1. Yet to win but has been in the money two times from four starts off this draw. Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (16.68) beating Auburn Queen in a Grade 5 on March 30. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split and led until late but gathered in when a 3 length fifth at this track over 350m in 19.38. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Q Lakeside, the latest when beaten 13 lengths behind Special Rocky over 352m. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 2.25 lengths over 300m at this track in a handy 16.63, beating Blue Serenade. Key chance on that latest effort.
